zh.Battle casualty: 南非特藍斯瓦阿爾芭特爾
zh.Dunbar, East Lothian, Scotland: 英國蘇格蘭易亞斯特 洛迪安鄧巴
zh.lifeSummary: 當Crínán of Dunkeld Mormaer of Atholl於0978年出生在英國蘇格蘭培爾登可爾德時，他的父親Duncan Mormaer Of Atholl29歲，母親Althelreda of Dunbar28歲。他於1000年與Bethóc ingen Maíl Coluim meic Cináeda在蘇格蘭培爾阿爾結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1045年8月14日在英國蘇格蘭培爾享年67歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭培爾登可爾德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Crínán of Dunkeld Mormaer of Atholl于0978年出生在英国苏格兰培爾登可爾德时，他的父亲Duncan Mormaer Of Atholl29岁，母亲Althelreda of Dunbar28岁。他于1000年与Bethóc ingen Maíl Coluim meic Cináeda在苏格兰培爾阿爾结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1045年8月14日在英国苏格兰培爾享年67岁，埋葬在苏格兰培爾登可爾德。

nameMeanings.name: of
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Young, Sung, Jung, Yong, Chang, Kwang, Sang, Dong, Hyun, Jae, Jin, Kyung, Jong, Chong, Chung, Byung, Jeong, Pyong, Myong, Hak, Jin Hwan, Sook, Yeong, Choon.

variants.name: O
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Young, Bo Young, Chae, Chong Hwan, Dong Kun, Ho, Hwan, Hyun, Jong, Jung, Ki Soon, Kwang.  Korean Min, Chong, Chol, Jung Ho, Myong, Sa, Sung Kyun.

Korean (오; Chinese character: 吳): historically, there were two Chinese characters for the O surname, but by the late Koryŏ period (14th century AD ), one of them had disappeared. Some records indicate that there are as many as 210 different clans for the remaining character, but only sixteen can be positively documented. All sixteen of these clans originate from the same ancestor, O Ch’ŏm (吳 瞻), who migrated to Korea from China during the reign of Shilla's King Chijŭng (500–514 AD ). O is a common surname throughout Korea. Compare Oh .

nameMeanings.name: Dunkeld
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: nickname from Middle Low German dunkel, a byform of dunker ‘dark, conceited, unclear’, also applied as a byname for a blind person. Compare Dunckel and Dunkle .

nameMeanings.name: Crínán
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Traditional: originally a byname from a diminutive of crón ‘swarthy’.

variants.name: Cronan
meanings: Traditional: originally a byname from a diminutive of crón ‘swarthy’.

variants.name: Cronin
meanings: Traditional: originally a byname from a diminutive of crón ‘swarthy’.

en.lifeSummary: When Crínán of Dunkeld Mormaer of Atholl was born in 0978, in Dunkeld, Perthshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, his father, Duncan Mormaer Of Atholl, was 29 and his mother, Althelreda of Dunbar, was 28. He married Bethóc ingen Maíl Coluim meic Cináeda in 1000, in Atholl, Perthshire, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 3 daughters. He died on 14 August 1045, in Perthshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 67, and was buried in Dunkeld, Perthshire, Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Crínán of Dunkeld Mormaer of Atholl est né en 0978, à Dunkeld, Perthshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, Duncan Mormaer Of Atholl, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Althelreda of Dunbar, avait 28 ans. Il a épousé Bethóc ingen Maíl Coluim meic Cináeda en 1000, à Atholl, Perthshire, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 14 août 1045, à Perthshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 67 ans, et a été enterré à Dunkeld, Perthshire, Écosse.

de.Dunbar, East Lothian, Scotland: Dunbar, East Lothian, Schottland, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Crínán of Dunkeld Mormaer of Atholl 0978 in Dunkeld, Perthshire, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Duncan Mormaer Of Atholl 29 und seine Mutter Althelreda of Dunbar 28. Er hat 1000 in Atholl, Perthshire, Scotland Bethóc ingen Maíl Coluim meic Cináeda geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 14. August 1045 im Alter von 67 Jahren in Perthshire, Schottland, United Kingdom und wurde in Dunkeld, Perthshire, Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Crínán of Dunkeld Mormaer of Atholl è nato il nel 0978 nel Dunkeld, Perthshire, Scozia, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Duncan Mormaer Of Atholl, aveva 29 anni e il suo madre, Althelreda of Dunbar, aveva 28 anni. Lui sposato Bethóc ingen Maíl Coluim meic Cináeda nel 1000, nel Atholl, Perthshire, Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 14 agosto 1045, nel Perthshire, Scozia, Regno Unito, all'età di 67 anni, e fu sepolto a Dunkeld, Perthshire, Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Crínán of Dunkeld Mormaer of Athollが0978年にイギリススコットランドペルスシュアイアダンケルドで生まれた時，父Duncan Mormaer Of Athollは29歳，母Althelreda of Dunbarは28歳であった。1000年にスコットランドペルスシュアイアアソルでBethóc ingen Maíl Coluim meic Cináedaと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1045年8月14日にイギリススコットランドペルスシュアイアで67歳で死去し，スコットランドペルスシュアイアダンケルドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Crínán of Dunkeld Mormaer of Atholl(이)가 0978년 영국 스코틀랜드 퍼스실르 던켈드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Duncan Mormaer Of Atholl(은)는 29세였고, 그의 어머니 Althelreda of Dunbar(은)는 28세였다. 그는 1000년 스컷랜드 퍼스실르 앳홀에서 Bethóc ingen Maíl Coluim meic Cináeda(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1045년 8월 14일 영국 스코틀랜드 퍼스실르에서 67세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드 퍼스실르 던켈드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Crínán of Dunkeld Mormaer of Atholl nasceu em 0978, em Dunkeld, Perthshire, Escócia, United Kingdom, seu pai, Duncan Mormaer Of Atholl, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Althelreda of Dunbar, tinha 28 anos. Ele casou-se com Bethóc ingen Maíl Coluim meic Cináeda em 1000, em Atholl, Perthshire, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 14 de agosto de 1045, em Perthshire, Escócia, United Kingdom, com 67 anos, e foi sepultado em Dunkeld, Perthshire, Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Crínán of Dunkeld Mormaer of Atholl родился в 0978 г. в местности дункелд, пиртшир, Шотландия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Duncan Mormaer Of Atholl было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Althelreda of Dunbar, 28. Он женился на женщине по имени Bethóc ingen Maíl Coluim meic Cináeda в 1000 г. в местности атолл, пиртшир, Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер 14 августа 1045 г. в местности пиртшир, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 67 лет и был похоронен в местности дункелд, пиртшир, Шотландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Crínán of Dunkeld Mormaer of Atholl nació en 0978, en Dunkeld, Perthshire, Escocia, Reino Unido, su papá, Duncan Mormaer Of Atholl, tenía 29 años y su mamá, Althelreda of Dunbar, tenía 28 años. Se casó con Bethóc ingen Maíl Coluim meic Cináeda en 1000, en Atholl, Perthshire, Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 14 de agosto de 1045, en Perthshire, Escocia, Reino Unido, a la edad de 67 años, y fue sepultado en Dunkeld, Perthshire, Scotland.
